metadata.title: Typewriter Scroll
metadata.description: Typewriter-style scrolling which keeps the view centered in the editor.

regex.source: .setDesc("Turns typewriter scrolling on or off globally")
regex.target: .setDesc("全局开启或关闭打字机滚动")

regex.source: .setDesc("Positions the typewriter text at the specified percentage of the screen")
regex.target: .setDesc("将打字机文本放置在屏幕的指定百分比位置")

regex.source: .setDesc("Darkens non-active lines in the editor so you can focus on what you're typing")
regex.target: .setDesc("在编辑器中加深非活动行的颜色，让您专注于正在输入的内容")

regex.source: .setDesc("The opacity of unfocused lines in zen mode")
regex.target: .setDesc("禅模式下非聚焦行的透明度")
